message:
test(telemetry): add inline telemetry counter tests for 10 modules

Add telemetry counter tests to: backpressure, circuit_breaker,
content_dedup, entropy_scheduler, kalman_watchdog, memory_budget,
pane_lifecycle, scrollback_eviction, snapshot_engine, wal_engine.

Each module gets tests for: initial_zero, counter increments on
key operations, and snapshot serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
